description: Inventory the project's actual stack: manifests and lockfiles (composer, npm/yarn/pnpm/bun), runtimes, engine constraints, docker images. Reports required vs installed versions and flags drift, missing locks, and EOL majors.

interface.longDescription:
Inventory the actual stack from composer/npm/yarn/pnpm/bun manifests and lockfiles, runtime pins, and docker/CI images; required-vs-installed table with drift, missing-lock, and EOL flags. Includes /stack-scan:report.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Inventory the project's actual stack: manifests and lockfiles (composer, npm/yarn/pnpm/bun), runtimes, engine constraints, docker images. Reports required vs installed versions and flags drift, missing locks, and EOL majors.

name: stack-scan
